name: Salisbury Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ground beef, bread crumbs, salt, pepper and egg; shape into 4 oval patties, each about 3/4 inch thick.
2. Cook patties in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat, turning occasionally, until brown, about ten minutes; drain.
3. Add onion, broth and mushrooms. Heat to boiling, reduce heat and simmer until beef is done, about 10 minutes.
4. Remove patties, keep warm. Heat onion mixture to boiling.
5. Mix water and cornstarch; stir into onion mixture. Boil and stir 1 minute before serving over patties.
